subcodes.title: Words to Mrs Goodall, spoken on 1912-10-11
subcodes.first_line: I want you to write this exactly, to the believers, giving the details. Tell them I have many letters from the Orient - all stating that the believers in the Orient have travelled long distances
subcodes.subjects: @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @race unity; racial issues, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
